body:
For same-day garage door repair in Pleasanton, CA, **_Precision Garage Door Service_** (925-268-9267) offers 7-day-a-week service from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM, specializing in rapid repairs for springs, openers, and cables, often completing work in one visit. Other options include _The Door Doctor_ (925-484-4290) and specialized, locally-serving companies that handle residential and commercial needs with on-site repairs.
